title: YT Queue Watcher
body:
Polls #1492901735629324418 every 2 min for new YouTube links and enqueues them to the processing queue.

Queue file: ~/.hermes/cache/yt_link_queue.json
Processed log: ~/.hermes/cache/processed_yt_urls.txt

title: YT Queue Worker
body:
Processes ONE YouTube link from the queue every 5 min via NotebookLM pipeline.

Handles 429/500 with exponential backoff (1m → 5m → 15m).
Max 3 retries before marking failed.

Saves results to: Research/Insights/ in Obsidian vault.
